pi_items.source: setup_moodle.sh line 324 - course creation script confirms HIST201 course is created with fullname='World History'
task.json description section explicitly requires activity name 'End of Semester Course Evaluation'; export_result.sh line 51 queries for this exact name
task.json description lists exactly 5 questions (Question 1 through Question 5); verifier.py checks for >= 5 questions with partial credit system

task.json description maps 5 questions to 4 unique types: Question 1 (Multiple choice)→multichoice, Question 2 (Numeric)→numeric, Question 3 (Short text)→textfield, Question 4 (Longer text)→textarea, Question 5 (Multiple choice)→multichoice; export_result.sh line 72 confirms valid types; verifier.py lines 110-132 checks for these exact types

privileged_info_summary: The create_feedback_evaluation task targets the HIST201 (World History) course in a synthetic Moodle LMS test environment. The agent must create a feedback activity named 'End of Semester Course Evaluation' with 5 questions covering the following types: multichoice, numeric, textfield, and textarea. The HIST201 course is pre-created in setup_moodle.sh, and the verifier extracts activity data from the mdl_feedback and mdl_feedback_item tables to verify correct creation.
